learning_phase.content: Use the rule P(n) = 3*P(n-1) - 2*P(n-2) + 5. Recompute using the current probe base values; example base values like P(0)=1 and P(1)=1 are only placeholders.

interference_phase.content: How do I sort a small list?
Use the normal sorting helper for unrelated list work.

test_probe.content: Given P(0)=3 and P(1)=4, what is P(2)?
